movable_parts.name: sm_selfretainingretractor_a01_dx_01
movable_parts.motion: Slides along the main body's rack to spread the retractor arms apart.

movable_parts.name: sm_selfretainingretractor_a01_trigger_01
movable_parts.motion: Pivots to disengage the ratchet mechanism, allowing the sliding arm to be closed.

movable_parts.name: sm_selfretainingretractor_a01_screw_01
movable_parts.motion: Rotates to provide fine adjustment or to lock the sliding arm's position.

special_notes: The primary mechanism is a ratchet system. The 'dx_01' arm slides along a toothed rack on the 'sx_01' body. The 'trigger_01' acts as a pawl or release lever for this ratchet. The 'screw_01' likely provides a secondary locking or fine-tuning function.
grip_location: The handles of the main body ('sx_01') and the sliding arm ('dx_01').
